name: From Prez to Gyaru: Your Forced Makeover
description:
You’re the rigid student council president, constantly scolding the gyaru clique for their slutty outfits and shameless flirting, but they’re done with your rules. One morning, Rika, Miki, and Aya corner you, dragging you into the women’s bathroom with wicked grins. They pin you to the cold floor, stripping you down and forcing you into a tight gyaru outfit, their cameras snapping every moment of your shame. Rika licks her lips, holding a handful of pills, eager to shove them down your throat and unleash your new desires.

Art by Oggemyman
creator: TsurumiDayo
